title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss how AI coding tools have changed their development workflows at scale. They share metrics on productivity gains, workflow changes across the SDLC, and approaches to measuring impact such as small pods accelerating roadmap timelines and shifting engineers' time allocation away from coding toward other activities.
